reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 저희집 강아지의 애착공입니다 :) 정말 몇년동안 이 공만 샀어요ㅠㅠ 저 주황공이 저렇게 닳을때 까지 사용하고 정말 다른공은 안쓰다가 바잇미 테니스공 새거 소리나면 그제서야 헌공 버릴수 있어요ㅠㅠ 부디 계속 팔아주셨으면 좋겠어요:)
reviews.content_en: It's my dog's favorite toy :) I've only bought this ball for years ㅠㅠ I use that orange ball until it gets this worn out, and I can't throw away the old one until I hear the sound of a new BITE ME tennis ball ㅠㅠ I really hope you keep selling it :)

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 라텍스 공 테니스 공 삑삑이 공 동물 공 물놀이 공 등등등 공이란 공은 모두 사고 줘봤는데 ... ㅋㅋ 가히 역대급이네요 저희 강아지가 살면서 본 강아지 중에 역대급 식탐 많아 항상 밥 먹을 때마다 전쟁인데 웬걸 이 공 온 순간부터 밥도 안 먹고 잠도 안 자고 물도 안 마시고 하루종일 ~~ 진짜 하루종일 눈 깜빡이지도 않고 삑삑삑 입에서 놓질 않아요 ㅋㅋ 3개 중에 하나 준 공은 반으로 찢어지다못해 형태를 알아볼 수 없어 버리고 나머지 두개는 상자 안에 넣어놓고 겨우 보관 중이네요 ㅋㅋ 대체 공에 뭐가 있는건지 ... 정신도 못 차리고 노는 공 눈에 띄면 그 날로 끝이라 사진도 상자 속에 카메라 넣어서 겨우겨우 찍습니다 .. 정말 여러분 .. 크기도 작아 놀기도 너무 좋고 기호성... 말도 하지 마세요.... 그냥 할인 하면 알림만 주세요... 10개 사야겠습니다 ... 바잇미 제품 ... 매번 과소비합니다 .. 책임져.. ㅠ
reviews.content_en: I've bought every ball you can think of - latex balls, tennis balls, squeaky balls, animal balls, water play balls, etc... ㅋㅋ This is legendary. My dog has the biggest appetite I've ever seen in any dog, and mealtimes are always a battle, but ever since this ball arrived, she won't eat, won't sleep, won't drink, and just squeaks all day long ~~ literally doesn't blink all day and won't let it out of her mouth ㅋㅋ Out of 3 balls, one got torn in half so badly I threw it away because you can't even tell what it is anymore, and the other two I've just stuffed in a box to keep them safe ㅋㅋ What on earth is in this ball... she can't even focus on anything else, and if she spots the ball to play with, that's it for the day, so I barely manage to take photos by putting the camera in the box... honestly everyone... the size is small and it's so fun to play with, and the palatability... don't even get me started... just give me a notification if there's a discount... I need to buy 10... BITE ME products... I always overspend... take responsibility.. ㅠ

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
몇개째 주문인지 몰라요. 최애공입니다 ㅎㅎ
산책가방에 항상 넣고 들고 다녀요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: I don't even know which order this is. It's my favorite ball ㅎㅎ I always keep it in my walking bag and carry it everywhere ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 평소에 공놀이 엄청 좋아해서 ~~ 테니스 공도 좋아하는 편인데   덩치는 좀 큰 편이지만 작은 사이즈를 장난감을 좋아하더라구요 ㅋㅋ그래서 옷사면서 테니스공 미니 있길래 구매 봤는데, 아주 좋아하네요 ~~~ 삑삑 소리도나고(근데 좀 세게 눌러야지 소리 나요 )통통 뛰어가지고 엄청 좋아해요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: My dog really loves ball play ~~ and likes tennis balls too, though the size is a bit big, I noticed he prefers smaller sized toys ㅋㅋ So when I was buying clothes, I saw a tennis ball mini available and decided to try it, and he really loves it ~~~ It makes a squeaky sound (though you have to press it pretty hard to get the sound) and it bounces around, he loves it so much ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 강아지용 장난감을 고양이가 사게 된 구구절절 계기.. 방울아씨가 폼폼이에 환장하는데 폼폼이는 작은 편이라 다른 곳 밑에 잘 들어가서 매번 꺼내줘야 하고 어디 틈에서 꺼내면 먼지가 조금씩 붙어있길래.. 폼폼이보다 좀 더 커서 들어가지 않을 크기인 강아지용 바잇미 미니 테니스공 사봤어요! 방울아씨는 입이 작아서 물고 다니는 건 못 보겠지만 눌러서 삑삑 소리가 나면 궁금해하고 꺼내주자마자 잘 굴리고 다녀서 아주 좋아요 폼폼이나 뭐 굴리고 다니는 거 좋아하는 고양이들도 도전 가능🫶
reviews.content_en: The long and winding story of how a cat ended up playing with a dog toy... My cat Bangul goes crazy for pom-poms, but they're small and get stuck under things so I have to pull them out every time, and they get dusty ㅠㅠ So I bought a BITE ME mini tennis ball for dogs that's a bit bigger than pom-poms so it won't get stuck! Bangul's mouth is small so I haven't seen her carrying it in her mouth, but when I press it and it makes a squeaky sound she gets curious, and right after I pull it out she rolls it around, she really loves it. Cats who like rolling pom-poms or other things around can definitely try this too 🫶

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 너만 보인단 말이야~~ 널 사랑한단 말이야~~ 바잇미 테니스 공 최애템이에요 ! 소리 나면 멀리서부터 달려와요 ㅎㅎㅎ 기존에 있던 공이 다 뜯겨서 다시 구매했어요 항상 만족이요:D
reviews.content_en: I only have eyes for you~~ I love you~~ BITE ME tennis ball is my favorite item! When it makes a sound she comes running from far away ㅎㅎㅎ My old ball got all torn up so I repurchased it. Always satisfied :D

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content:
장마철 산책도 못나가고 심심한 저희 강아지 (공또) 에게 선물 했어요 ㅎㅎ 세개 들어 있어서 질려 할 때 즈음 하나 씩 더 꺼내 쥬기 좋아용! 귀여운 테니스공을 보니 라켓을 꺼내고 싶어져 ㅋㅋㅋ 찍어보았는데 컬러감 힙하네여!
사이즈도 딱 좋구 잘가지고 놀아용~~
reviews.content_en: I got it as a gift for my dog Kongto who couldn't even go for walks during rainy season and was bored ㅎㅎ It comes with three, so it's great to pull out one at a time when they start to get bored! Seeing the cute tennis ball made me want to pull out the racket ㅋㅋㅋ I took some photos and the colors look so hip! The size is just right and she plays with it well ~~

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
공 크기가 생각보다 크지 않을까 했는데 
딱 적당한 사이즈라 좋아요! 애기도 공 들자마자 신나하더라구요 장난감은 역시 바잇미ㅠ
reviews.content_en: I was worried the ball size would be bigger than expected, but it's the perfect size! My baby got excited as soon as she picked up the ball. Toys are definitely BITE ME ㅠ

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
작은 공이 필요했는데 마침 딱 나와서 바로 구매했어요 ! 
너무 좋아요 ,,,, 예전에 총으로 공 쏘는 장난감 썼을땐 공이 넘 커서 못물어왔는데 정말 소형견에게 딱입니다 :) 

3개나 있어서 집이랑 차 이렇게 두고 쓰려고요 만족 
애기도 넘 좋아해요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: I needed a small ball and it came out at just the right time so I bought it right away! I love it so much ,,,, Before when I used a toy gun to shoot balls, the ball was too big and she couldn't retrieve it, but this is perfect for small dogs :) There are 3 of them so I'm planning to keep them in two places - at home and in the car. Really satisfied. My baby loves it so much ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 소형견이 물기에 크지도 작지도 않은 딱 좋은 사이즈구 강아지도 넘 좋아해요~!
reviews.content_en: The size is just right - not too big, not too small - for a small dog, and my dog loves it so much~!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 애들이좋아해요 가볍고소리나서좋아요ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: The kids love it, it's light and makes a sound, great ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content:
공 장난감에 환장하는 아이라서 사줘봤어요!
역시나 삑삑 거리면서 잘 놀면서 안뺏기려고 하네욬ㅋㅋ
크기도 작고 귀여워요!
reviews.content_en: I got it for my baby who goes crazy for ball toys! She plays really well with the squeaky sound and doesn't want to let go of it ㅋㅋ The size is small and cute!

reviews.name: 류****
reviews.content: 별명이 공순이인 우리애기~ 이제까지 사봤던 공들중에 제일 만족스럽네요! 잘 튀기고 가볍고 삑삑소리까지 납니다ㅎㅎ 다만 아쉬운건 조금만 더 크기가 컸으면 하네요~ 클수록 더 멀리 날아가니깐요! 다음에 또 구매할게욤
reviews.content_en: My baby's nickname is Ball Girl - of all the balls I've bought so far, this is the one I'm most satisfied with! It bounces well, it's light, and it even makes a squeaky sound ㅎㅎ The only downside is I wish it was a little bigger~ The bigger it is, the farther it goes! I'll definitely buy it again next time

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
이거 왜 안 사 ? 🥱 ; ;; 
야무지게 튼튼한 테니스공 ! 보통 사람 테니스공처럼 크지 않고 적당해서 잘 물고 와요 이제 테니스공 업스면 안 돼 .. ദ്ദി ˉ͈̀꒳ˉ͈́ )✧
외출할 때도 본가 내려갈 때도 무조건 필수템 ,, 
쿠키는 완전 테니스공 끼고 삽니다잉 .. 
좀 세게 누르면 삑삑 소리도 나요 ! 
지푸라기는 잘 붙으니까 조심 하셔야 돼용 저희는 하나는 지퍼팩에 넣어서 외출용으로 편하게 쓰고 있어용 🧸🫧
입에 물고 오는 것도 왕 귀엽 ㅋㅋ 
잃어버리거나 .. 하면 무조건 재구매 ! 바잇미에서 사는 게 싸용 애견카페 같은 곳 갔는데 이거 똑같은 거 낱개로 비싸게 팔더라구용 참고하셔유
reviews.content_en: Why aren't you buying this? 🥱 ; ;; A tough little tennis ball! It's not as big as a regular tennis ball for people and is just the right size so she grabs and brings it back well. I can't go without tennis balls now .. ദ്ദി ˉ͈̀꒳ˉ͈́ )✧ It's an absolute must-have for outings or visiting family, Cookie literally lives with the tennis ball in her mouth .. When you press it a bit hard, it makes a squeaky sound! Straw sticks to it pretty easily so be careful. We keep one in a ziplock bag for easy outdoor use 🧸🫧 She's so cute carrying it in her mouth too ㅋㅋ If she loses it or anything, we absolutely rebuy! It's cheaper from BITE ME. I went to a dog cafe nearby and they were selling the exact same thing individually for way more money, just so you know 🧸

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
공은 그저 뜯는 것인줄 알고 삑삑이 사냥을 하는 저희 범수가 정말 좋아하는 공이에요! 근처 애견카페에서 사서 좋아서 대량구매했어요~ 꼭 오래오래 팔아주세요! 그리고 농구코트에서 공놀이 하면 너무나 사진도 예쁘게 나오ㅓ용! 색감도 못 잃어 ㅎㅎ 
라텍스 삑삑이들보다 단단해서 좀 더 오래가요~
reviews.content_en: My Bumsu loves hunting for squeaky balls thinking all balls are just meant to be torn up! I bought it at a nearby dog cafe and loved it so much I bought in bulk~ Please keep selling it forever! And when we play ball at the basketball court, the photos come out so pretty! The color doesn't fade either ㅎㅎ It's firmer than latex squeaky toys so it lasts longer~

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content:
낯설어하지도 않고 처음부터 너무 잘갖고 놀아요 ㅋㅋㅋ
아 근데 공이 이렇게 귀엽다니ㅜㅠㅠ
입에 물고 다니면 귀여워서 기절입니다…
저희 댕댕이 3.4kg 3개월쯤 된 믹스견인데 공사이즈가 딱 좋네요
어디 놀러갈때마다 꼭 챙겨가는 필수템이에요💕
reviews.content_en: She didn't seem uncomfortable with it at all and played with it so well from the very beginning ㅋㅋㅋ Ah but how can a ball be this cute ㅜㅠㅠ I almost faint when she carries it in her mouth... My puppy is a 3.4kg mix about 3 months old and the ball size is just perfect. It's a must-have item we always bring everywhere we go 💕

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
너~무 소심하고 겁이 많은 아이라 장난감이나 간식을 사는데 있어 고민이 참 많은데요, 이 공은 너무 만족합니다.
전에 있던 공은 크기도 컸지만 소리나 크기때문인가 무서워해서 제대로 놀아본 적이  없거든요.
5일만에 이 공을 물고 오기 시작했습니다.
그 후 품에 안고 자고 있는 모습이 여러 번 보여요~
사이즈도 아이한테 딱 맞고 삑삑 소리도 크지않아 넘 맘에 듭니다~^^
reviews.content_en: My dog is very timid and scared of a lot of things, so I always have a hard time choosing toys and treats, but I'm so satisfied with this ball. The previous ball was big and she was scared of it because of the sound or size, so she never really played with it. She started bringing this ball back after just 5 days. Since then I've seen her several times holding it in her arms while sleeping~ The size is perfect for her and the squeaky sound isn't too loud, I love it so much~^^

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
삑삑🎾 병아리같은 소리 대박이가 넘 좋아 했어요
덩치에 비해 작은 장난감 좋아하는 아이라 재밌게 놀고 그러고 있답니다

이번에 재구매했어요. 
우리아기는 저랑 잠깐 이별했지만 추억하고 싶고 다른강아지한테 나눠줄겸 샀어요.
reviews.content_en: The squeaky 🎾 baby chick-like sound was awesome and he really loved it. He's a dog who likes small toys for his size, so he plays with it really well. I repurchased it this time. My baby and I were apart briefly, but I bought it to reminisce and to share with another dog.

reviews.name: 나****
reviews.content:
바잇미
바잇미 장난감 너무귀엽고 실용적이예요
우리집 막내가 너무 잘. 가지고 놀아요
reviews.content_en: BITE ME, BITE ME toys are so cute and practical. My youngest loves playing with them so much

reviews.name: 오****
reviews.content: 딱딱할까봐 걱정했는데 전혀 안그렇구요~후기대로 소형견에 딱!이네요~던져주면 물고 잘 오고, 울 아가 넘 좋아해서 제게 안겨 쉴때도 갖고오네요ㅋ
reviews.content_en: I was worried it might be too hard, but it's not at all~ It's perfect for small dogs just like the reviews said~! When I throw it, she grabs it and brings it back well, and my baby loves it so much she even brings it when she comes to rest in my lap ㅋ

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
다른 장난감은 잘 안갖고 노는데,
공은 좋아하는 편이에요. 
특히 이 공은 너무 좋아하네요 ㅋㅋ 😜
reviews.content_en: She doesn't really play with other toys, but she likes balls. Especially this ball, she loves it so much ㅋㅋ 😜

reviews.name: 손****
reviews.content: 삑삑+공 조합이라서 엄청나게 좋아합니다..... 그리고 장난감 다 찢어서 금방 망가뜨렸는데 적당히 단단해서 잘 가지고 놀아요!
reviews.content_en: I love the squeak + ball combination so much..... Plus, my dog destroys all toys and breaks them quickly, but this one is appropriately durable so she plays with it well!

reviews.name: 오****
reviews.content: 놀이터 갈 때 필수품! 칭구들 없어서 공 하나 던져주면 잘 놀아요! 색도 이쁘고 튼튼해서 좋아요~ 삑삑 거리니까 잘 물고와요
reviews.content_en: A must-have for the playground! Even without friends, if I throw a ball for her, she plays well! Pretty color and durable, I love it~ Because it squeaks, she retrieves it well

reviews.name: 나****
reviews.content:
바잇미
테니스공 장난감. 
막내만 좋아할줄 알았는데
의외로 우리 아들들. 셋다. 무지 좋아한다
뛰고. 날라다닌다
reviews.content_en: BITE ME tennis ball toy. I thought only my youngest would like it but surprisingly all three of my boys like it so much. They run and chase it everywhere

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
소듕한 테니스공
통통튀고 작아 애기들이 너무 좋아합니다
ㅋㅋ귀여워 죽어요
지금 간식빼먹는데 정신팔려서 공은 뒷전입니다만ㅋ
바잇미 짱짱
reviews.content_en: A solid little tennis ball. It bounces well and is small so the kids love it so much ㅋㅋ So cute I could die. Right now they're distracted skipping treats and ignoring the ball ㅋ BITE ME fighting!

reviews.name: 남****
reviews.content:
집에 오자마자 저희 강아지 최애 장난감이 되었어요!
공도 너무 귀엽고 사이즈도 딱 알맞아서 강아지들이 물기 편해요
무게도 가볍습니다
reviews.content_en: As soon as it came home, it became my dog's favorite toy! The ball is so cute and the size is just right so it's easy for the dogs to grab. The weight is light too

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 되게 잘가지고 놀아요 다만 ㅜㅜ 다소 물었을때 힘이 들어가는게 일반 솜인형보단 물기 어렵긴 한거 같아요 그리고 침대에서 떨어뜨리는 버릇이 잇는데 은근히 무게가 잇어서 그런가 쿵소리가 나긴하네요 ㅜ 그점이 아쉽 조금 덜 탄력이 있었음 어땟을까 십기도….그래도 강아지는 엄청 잘가지고ㅠ놀아요
reviews.content_en: She plays with it really well, but the only downside ㅜㅜ is that it requires quite a bit of force when biting compared to regular plush toys, so it's a bit harder to bite. And I have a habit of dropping things from the bed, and it has some weight so it makes a thud sound ㅜ That's a bit disappointing, I wonder what it would've been like with a bit less elasticity.... But my dog plays with it so well ㅠ

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
공순이 공순이 자나깨나 공만 물고 빠는 망고의 생일 선물로 올해도 새 공을 준비하게 되었습니다
늘 콩 제품만 썼었는데 바잇미에 쨍한 오렌지색의 삑삑이 공이 있더라고요!
콩만 몇년 쓰다 이번에 공을 바꿔주며 느낀 장점은
작지만 탄탄하다! 겉을 감싸고 있는 털의 조직력이 꽤 견고하여
우리 망고가 쉽게 뜯지 못하는 게 너무 마음에 들구요
삑삑이 소리가 나는 부분이 숨어있다는 거예요!!
늘 삑삑이 부분을 입으로 뜯어내서 공이 너덜너덜해지는 데다가
소리가 나지 않으니 금방 흥미를 잃었었거든요
색은 말해 뭐해요.. 전 테니스공은 다 형광색인줄 알았는데
제가 좋아하는 오뤤쥐라니...!
이렇게 엄마도 딸도 모두 너무 만족하는 장난감을 만나서
망고의 다섯번째 생일도 참 행복하게 잘 보낸 거 같아요 🎾🧡
reviews.content_en: Mango, my little ball girl who sucks on a ball day and night, received a new ball for her birthday this year. I've always used Kong products, but I found a bright orange squeaky ball from BITE ME! After using Kong for several years, I discovered the advantages of switching to this ball: it's small but sturdy! The fabric wrapping has quite solid structure so Mango can't easily tear it apart, which I love. And the squeaker is hidden!! I used to always have her tear out the squeaker part with her mouth, making the ball all tattered, and then she'd lose interest since there's no sound. Don't even get me started on the color... I thought all tennis balls were neon, but it's this orange I love...! Finding a toy that makes both mama and daughter so happy, Mango's fifth birthday was really wonderful 🎾🧡

reviews.name: 나****
reviews.content:
바잇미
바잇미 테니스공 장난감
의외로
내가 막내 아들. 장난감을 아주 잘 고르고 있다.
내가 바잇미 에서. 사준 장난감들 다 잘 가지고 놀고 있음
귀여운. 내 사랑. 3형제
reviews.content_en: BITE ME, BITE ME tennis ball toy. Surprisingly, I pick out toys really well for my youngest son. All the BITE ME toys I've bought him are playing with great. My cute love, the 3 brothers

reviews.name: 나****
reviews.content:
바잇미
바잇미,테니스공.장난감,3개
야,색상.의,이,크기,장난감.을,제일
잘,가지고,놀아요
너무,즐거워해요
reviews.content_en: BITE ME, BITE ME, tennis ball, toy, 3 pack. My dog plays with the colors, size, and toys the best. She's having so much fun

reviews.name: G****
reviews.content:
이 공으로 말씀 드릴것 같으면 저희집에 항상 쟁여두는 제품 입니다 하루에 한개씩 뜯어제끼시기 때문에 쟁여두고 드려야 해요
테니스공 스타일 중에 가장 적당한 크기고 애기가 너무 좋아해서 한 백개는 지금까지 산거 같아요
reviews.content_en: I have to say this ball is a product we always keep stocked at home. Since my pup tears through one every day, I have to keep buying them in bulk. It's the perfect size among tennis ball styles, and my baby loves it so much that I think I've bought around a hundred of them by now.

reviews.name: 희****
reviews.content: 너무 잘가지고 놀아요 사이즈도작아서 입에 딱맞게 들어와서 신나게놀아서 기분이 좋아요ㅎㅈㅎ
reviews.content_en: My dog plays with it so well! The size is small and fits perfectly in their mouth, so they have a blast playing with it. Makes me so happy hehe 😊

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
강아지가 공놀이 좋아해서 꺼내 주기도 전에 난리 났어요🧡
미니테니스공 더 작은 사이즈 잘 가지고 놀아서 더 사주고 싶었는데 품절이라 그냥 미니로 사봤어요. 조금 크지만 좋아해요!
reviews.content_en: My pup went crazy even before I took the ball out! 🧡 I wanted to get the mini tennis ball in the smaller size since they played with it so well, but it was out of stock so I just got the regular mini instead. It's a bit bigger but they love it!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
공에 미친 푸들입니다ᆢ
테니스공만 가지고 노는데ᆢ
연두색 삑삑이 테니스공 계속쓰다 
우연히 바잇미꺼 써보고 괜찮아 바꿨습니다ᆢ
개인적으로 터그도하고씹기도 하는 공인짓나ᆢ
연두색삑삑이 테니스공보다 보풀이 좀 덜 일어나는 느낌입니다
reviews.content_en: This is a ball-obsessed poodle. They only play with tennis balls. I used to use the lime green squeaky tennis ball, but I randomly tried a BITE ME one and it was good enough that I switched. Personally, it's a ball that's good for both tug-of-war and chewing. It seems like there's a bit less fuzz coming off compared to the lime green squeaky tennis ball.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 울 애기들 삑삑이 쳐돌이에 특히 한 아이가 테니스공이면 환장하는데 완전 좋아해요 ㅋㅋ 장난감도 귀엽고 3개라서 좋아요 자기 전에 맨날 삑삑 갖고 놀다가 품에 끼고 자네요ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: My babies are squeaky toy fanatics, and one of them especially goes crazy for tennis balls - they absolutely love this! The toy is cute and there are 3, which is great. They play with the squeaky before bed and then cuddle with it to sleep hehe

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content: 공.. 좋아하는건 알았는데 자기 사이즈에 딱 맞아서 그런지 유독 환장하네요.. 일주일도 안돼서 너덜너덜 해졌어요 ㅠㅠ 그래도 다행히 세개나 들어있어서 3주는 쓰겠네요,,, 공 좋아하는데 항상 공이 몸에 비해 커서 턱 빠질까 걱정됐었는데 이거는 사이즈가 딱이에요! 공 좋아하는 소형견 친구들 완전 추천합니다! ♥️
reviews.content_en: I knew my pup liked balls, but because this one fits their size perfectly, they're especially obsessed with it. It got all frayed in less than a week 😭 But thankfully there are three included so we'll get about 3 weeks out of them. My dog always loves balls but I was worried their mouth would be too big and they'd lose it, but this size is perfect! I totally recommend this for small dogs that love balls! ♥️

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
공친놈인 저희 댕댕쓰,,,, 보자마자 물어뜯고 난리네욬ㅋㅋㅋ
너무좋아해요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: My ball-crazy pup sees it and immediately starts chewing it up and going wild lol They absolutely love it!!!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
색도 너무 이쁘고 진짜 테니스공 재질 느낌이에요
하지만 다 물어 뜯는 울 댕댕이는 사용 불가 ㅠㅜ
공 좋아하는 오빠 줬어요~~^^
reviews.content_en: The color is so pretty and it really feels like a real tennis ball texture. But my pup who chews everything up can't use it 😭 I gave it to my other dog who loves balls instead~~^^

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
중형견 아이 입에 딱 알맞는 크기라 엄청 좋아해요.
예전에 한번 사줬는데 오렌지부분을 이로 뜯어내서 고무가 나오게 만들어 놓더라고요. 아이만 즐거웠음 됬죠..ㅎㅎ 생각나서 올만에 한번 더 구매해요
reviews.content_en: It's the perfect size for my medium-sized dog's mouth so they absolutely love it. I got one for them before and they chewed off the orange part and exposed the rubber underneath. As long as the pup had fun that's what matters hehe I remembered it so I'm getting one again!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 애견카페에서 보고 너무 좋아하길래 따라샀는데 역시나 택배뜯을때부터 난리네요 삑삑이소리도 오래가고 튼튼해요
reviews.content_en: I saw it at a dog café and my pup loved it so much I ended up buying it too. Sure enough, they went crazy from the moment I opened the package. The squeaky sound lasts a long time and it's durable!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 공이 작아서 소형견에게도 딱 좋네요 배송 오자마자 잘 가지고 놀아요 ㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: The ball is small so it's perfect for small dogs too. They play with it right away once the package arrives lol

reviews.name: 손****
reviews.content:
소형견도 입에 물기 좋아서 재구매 
아기가 너무 좋아하는 공이에요
다만 표면이 너덜너덜해지는게 흠
reviews.content_en: Small dogs love having it in their mouth so I repurchased. It's a ball my baby absolutely loves. The only downside is the surface gets frayed easily.

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
두번째 구매에요
밖에서 쓰면 망가지는거 순식간인데 크기도 적당하고 삑삑소리도 좋아해서 잘써요^^
reviews.content_en: This is my second purchase. It gets destroyed quickly when used outside, but the size is just right and the squeaky sound is great, so we use it well ^^

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content: 처음 보고 크기가 작나 싶었는데 13키로 코카 입에 물고 다니는게 좋은가봐요 잘가지고 놀아서 좋아요 물어 뜯는거 좋아해서 망가지면 두개 더있으니까 걱정 없습니다 삑삑소리도 나서 좋아욥
reviews.content_en: I wasn't sure about the size at first, but my 13kg cocker spaniel loves carrying it around in their mouth. They play with it nicely and since they love chewing, there's no worry with two more included. Plus it makes a squeaky sound so it's great!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 삑삑 소리가 독특하고 통통 튀니까 너무 재밌어합니다.
reviews.content_en: The squeaky sound is unique and it bounces so much that they have so much fun with it.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 저희 강얼쥐는 토이푸들 80일된 애기에요! 이제 이빨이 나고 있는데, 많이 간지러운지 애착담요나 손가락을 앙~ 하는걸 좋아하는데요. 바잇미에서 장난감 사주고 아주아주 잘논답니다 ㅎㅎ 아직 간식을 못먹는 애기라 어떻게 놀아줄까 ~~~~ 하다가 바잇미에서 탈취제산거 뿌려서 바짝 말려주고~ 썼는데 냄새도 안나고 작고 하찮은게 아주 귀여움 더 장착했어요! ㅎㅎㅎ 아직 산책을 못해서 집에만 있거나 본가에 가거나 하는데, 본가에 갈때도 이 장난감 하나만 챙겨가면 노는데 걱정없답니다
reviews.content_en: My pup is a Toy Poodle who's 80 days old! Their teeth are coming in now and they seem to get itchy often, so they like to chew on their attachment blanket or my fingers. We got a toy from BITE ME and they play with it so so well! Since they can't eat treats yet, I was wondering how to keep them entertained, so I sprayed some of BITE ME's deodorizer on it and dried it completely, and it works great with no smell. It's small and cute so I got more! Since they can't go on walks yet and just stay home or go to grandma's, I just bring this one toy and they play worry-free!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 우리  강아지 토리가 넘 좋와해요...
reviews.content_en: Our dog Tori absolutely loves it...

reviews.name: 오****
reviews.content: 3키로 미만 포메라니안인 저희집 초코가 가지구 놀기 딱 좋은 크기의 공입니다. 삑삑이 장난감 킬러인데 재질도 단단한 편이어서 삑삑이도 오래 살아남아요.
reviews.content_en: Our Choco is a Pomeranian under 3kg and this ball is the perfect size for her to play with. She's a squeaky toy killer but the material is sturdy enough that the squeaky sound lasts a long time.

reviews.name: 손****
reviews.content: 입에 물리는 사이즈에 삑삑이도 돼서 진짜 좋아해요. 테니스 공이 다른 공보다 잘 튀어서 제일 좋아하는데 강아지용 있어서 좋아요. 튼튼해보여요.
reviews.content_en: It's the perfect size to fit in their mouth and it squeaks too, so they really love it. Tennis balls bounce better than other balls so that's their favorite, and I'm glad there's a dog version. It looks durable.

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content: 삑삑이, 테니스공 둘 다 좋아하는 애라 사봤어요. 마음에 드나봐요. 일반 테니스공보다 작아서 입에 물기도 편해보입니다.
reviews.content_en: My pup likes both squeaky toys and tennis balls so I got this. They seem to love it. It's smaller than regular tennis balls so it's easier for them to carry in their mouth.
